name: GET /api/properties/_status - property-service readiness probe
description: Operator-readable status route confirming property-service has booted with DataService + PropertyDomain wired up. Lives until the real Phase-1 CRUD routes (POST /api/properties + PATCH /api/properties/:id + GET /api/properties + GET /api/properties/:slug + PATCH /api/properties/:id/publish) land in the next Phase 1 tasks.

testCases.name: Service reports ready with domain constructed
